scripts.infra:host-ollama: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.host-ollama.yml up --build api frontend db pgadmin
scripts.dev:full: pnpm run models:download:docker && pnpm run infra
scripts.models:download:docker: docker compose run --rm -e HF_HUB_OFFLINE=0 -e TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=0 api python scripts/download_models.py
scripts.ollama:pull: docker compose exec ollama ollama pull qwen2.5:14b-instruct
